<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What are you trying to do that you can't do today? -->

<!-- What should the feature do? How would you use it? -->

## Safety Concerns

<!-- Does this touch any guarded operations (reset, flash, write paths)? If yes, describe the guardrails needed. -->

- [ ] No device-safety implications
- [ ] Involves guarded control flow (reset/flash/write) — guardrail design needed
- [ ] Firmware interaction — safety review required

## Parity Target

<!-- Which upstream Ubertooth capability does this align with? -->

- [ ] Safe host parity (read-only / diagnostics)
- [ ] Fuller parity (capture improvements, Wireshark integration)
- [ ] New Windows-specific capability
- [ ] Developer experience / tooling

## Milestone Alignment

<!-- Which milestone does this belong to? -->

- [ ] Milestone 4 — hardening / public polish
- [ ] Phase 2 — fuller parity
- [ ] Future / no milestone yet
